expectedDispatchSequence.description: Five Criteria verification + Four Death Patterns detection on meta-genesis
Aggregate prism findings into actionable synthesis report

forbiddenBehavior: meta-theory must NOT perform the quality audit itself; all analysis belongs to dispatched agents

passFailCriteria.PASS: meta-prism is dispatched first with agent definition content, then meta-warden synthesizes prism output
passFailCriteria.FAIL: meta-theory outputs the evidence table or quality rating directly without spawning agents

input: Review this agent definition for quality issues

expectedDispatchSequence.description: Quality audit dispatched via Agent tool
Synthesis dispatched via Agent tool

forbiddenBehavior: meta-theory writes >3 sentences of substantive analysis, review findings, or synthesis directly

input: 实现用户认证系统，包括登录、注册、token 刷新、权限验证

expectedDispatchSequence.description: Critical — clarify scope, confirm auth requirements
Fetch — search existing agents/skills for auth capabilities
Thinking — produce runHeader, dispatchBoard, workerTaskPackets, and all Stage 3 artifacts
Execution — spawn sub-agents via Agent tool based on Fetch results
Review — quality audit of execution outputs
Meta-Review — review the review standards themselves
Verification — confirm fixes close review findings
Evolution — extract structural learning, write back durable changes

forbiddenBehavior: meta-theory writes code directly without Agent tool invocations in Stage 4; Stage 4 starts before Stage 3 artifacts are complete

passFailCriteria.PASS: All 8 stages present; Stage 4 uses explicit Agent tool calls; Stage 3 artifacts defined before Stage 4
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Direct code writing in Stage 4, missing stages, or Stage 3 artifacts absent

input: I need someone to check code quality on my new module

expectedDispatchSequence.description: Fetch — search who declares ownership of code quality review
Match — score capability fit 0-3, select best owner
Invoke — dispatch matched agent without hardcoding name

forbiddenBehavior: Hardcoding an agent name without a prior Fetch search step; skipping capability matching

passFailCriteria.PASS: Fetch-first pattern followed: Search → Match → Invoke; agent selected by capability, not by name
passFailCriteria.FAIL: Agent name hardcoded without search; dispatch bypasses the capability matching step

input: Track the lifecycle of agent dispatches during a Type A review

expectedDispatchSequence.description: agentInvocationState transitions: idle → discovered → matched → dispatched
agentInvocationState transitions: dispatched → returned (on success) or escalated (on failure)
agentInvocationState transitions: idle → discovered → matched → dispatched → returned

forbiddenBehavior: agentInvocationState not tracked; state jumps from idle directly to dispatched without discovery and matching

passFailCriteria.PASS: Each dispatched agent has its agentInvocationState tracked through the full lifecycle: idle → discovered → matched → dispatched → returned/escalated
passFailCriteria.FAIL: State tracking is absent or incomplete; no evidence of lifecycle transition logging

Log capability gaps to memory/capability-gaps.md
